hero.badge: AI Writing Platform for Fiction and Scripts
hero.titlePart2: One Workspace for the Full Book
hero.description: zenstory unifies project files, material capture, character setup, chapter drafting, and version rollback in one workspace. Build structure first, draft faster, and revise without losing your thread.
hero.ctaSubtext: No credit card required · Launch in 3 minutes

whyChoose.title: Built for long-form creation
whyChoose.subtitle: Not just prompt replies, but full project momentum

conversational.title: Conversational Creation
conversational.description: Create as naturally as chatting with a friend, AI understands your intent and helps refine your ideas

context.title: Deep Context Understanding
context.description: AI remembers your character sheets, world-building, and plot to maintain story consistency

multiType.title: Multi-format Support
multiType.description: Whether it's novels, short stories, or screenplays, handle them all with ease

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.description: Your content is private by default and is not used for model training unless you explicitly opt in

voiceInput.title: Voice Quick Capture
voiceInput.description: Speak ideas instantly, transcribe them, and pin them to your active chapter.

materialUpload.title: Dual-Track Materials
materialUpload.description: Run in-project snippets and a standalone material library together for upload, parsing, and reuse.

contextAware.title: Persistent Context Memory
contextAware.description: Keep characters, world rules, and plot lines active to reduce contradictions.

versionHistory.title: Version Rollback and Diff
versionHistory.description: Every revision is logged for rollback and comparison, so edits stay low-risk.

cloudSync.title: Project-level Cloud Sync
cloudSync.description: Keep progress synced across devices and continue writing from anywhere.

export.title: Export-ready Delivery
export.description: Package chapter structure before export to reduce formatting friction.

projectTypes.title: Three project modes, ready out of the box
projectTypes.subtitle: Built-in file trees, chapter ordering, material references, and AI strategies

novel.name: Long-form Serialized Novel
novel.description: For 50k+ word projects requiring stable world-building and chapter progression

short.name: Short and Novelette Fiction
short.description: For 5k-20k word stories that need fast setup, escalation, and clean resolution

screenplay.name: Short Drama and Web Series Scripts
screenplay.description: For episodic structures, character arcs, and scene-ready script output

pricingTeaser.title: Start free, upgrade when needed
pricingTeaser.subtitle: Free plan covers the full writing flow, and paid tiers unlock more speed and higher limits.

free.title: Get started quickly
free.desc: Best for solo creators getting started with project setup and core writing workflows.

pro.title: Boost speed and capacity
pro.desc: For high-frequency writing with larger context windows and higher AI usage limits.

team.title: Collaborate with one source of truth
team.desc: For studios managing shared materials, version history, and project coordination.

cta.title: Start your next story today
cta.subtitle: Set up a project in minutes and turn scattered ideas into reusable creative assets

footer.tagline: Put AI in your creative production line

character.name: Su Wan · Enigmatic Supporting Female
character.personalityDesc: Cold as ice on the outside, but delicate on the inside, with complex feelings for Lin Yi...
character.secretDesc: True identity is a descendant of an ancient god clan

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.input: Create a mysterious supporting female character for my fantasy novel
ai.response: Great! I'll create a mysterious female supporting character.
ai.desc: Inner disciple of Qingyun Sect, mysterious identity...

sceneSuggest.content1: At the summit of Qingyun Mountain, clouds and mist shroud everything.
sceneSuggest.content2: Lin Yi stood at the cliff edge, looking at the abyss beneath him, smiling bitterly. Three years ago, the moment he awakened his useless constitution sealed his fate today.
sceneSuggest.content3: Suddenly, a silver figure walked out from the clouds and mist—it was Su Wan, that senior sister who never spoke to anyone.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.input: Help me write the opening of Chapter 1
ai.response: Great! I'll write a suspenseful opening.

sceneEdit.scene1Desc: Qingyun Grand Competition opens, forces from all sides gather
sceneEdit.scene2Desc: Lin Yi's first battle against senior brother Zhang Yao, shows amazing strength
sceneEdit.scene3Desc: Su Wan watches Lin Yi in the audience, complex look in her eyes

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.input: Expand Chapter 3 outline, add combat and Su Wan's subplot
ai.response: Great! I'll add combat and Su Wan's subplot.

agentApi.title: Connect your AI agent to your writing workspace
agentApi.subtitle: Generate an API key, paste into Claude Code or OpenClaw, and let your agent read and write your novel directly.
agentApi.ctaAriaLabel: Get started with Agent API for free
